title: Cloudflare’s slowing growth disappoints investors betting on AI boost

title: OpenAI’s image boom in Singapore signals AI visuals are entering the execution phase for marketers
description: Singapore’s rapid adoption of ChatGPT Images 2.0 shows marketers are moving from AI experimentation to production workflows

title: SpaceX Partners With Anthropic to Provide AI Computing Power for Claude
description: SpaceX has partnered with Anthropic to provide computing power from its Colossus 1 facility in Memphis, helping the Claude AI maker meet rising demand. The deal marks a shift for Elon Musk, who previously criticised Anthropic but now says he will support AI firms working for humanity's benefit

title: Trump to regulate AI development after Anthropic's Mythos posed cybersecurity threat - report
description: US Vice President JD Vance was "alarmed" by the capabilities of the latest AI models, after a call with the heads of the biggest artificial-intelligence companies, The Wall Street Journal reported.

title: Mckinsey: Firms See 20% EBITDA Boost With Focused AI Strategy
